name: 💧 Skirk
description:
The bot was made based on the request under the previous bot on the other site. From this moment I will post my bots here too.

• In the coming days, even more of all my promised bots will be released, among them: Silver Wolf, Dahua, Soroka.

• I made her the same gentle mommy as Acheron and Black Swan. I hope the difference between them will be noticeable, even though they had the same type. Skirk combines three fetishes: Small Penis Adoration, Small Penis Humuliation, Cock and Ball Torture.

The bot was designed for a small penis (possibly micro). There are no restrictions, but problems may arise.

• Greeting Messages:

⠀⠀1 : Default greeting, pretty SFW. You can use it as a start for Small Penis Adoration kink.

• And now it's time to choose the next character (Besides the ones I promised to do). Write the one you want in the reviews. And I would also appreciate it if you write the desired kinks or your own options!

⠀⠀— Fu Xuan, HSR. So far I think she will focus on blowjobs.

⠀⠀— Kafka, HSR. Choose clean SPH or mommy-type.

⠀⠀— Shenhe, GI. I think you understand what it will be like.

Good luck to RP with her. Don't forget to review!

Also, please, share some chats.
